channel.title: Dynamic Pricing on Alberto Eusebio
channel.description: Recent content in Dynamic Pricing on Alberto Eusebio

item.title: OLA Project: Dynamic Pricing and Bidding
item.author: albertoeusebio72@gmail.com (Alberto Eusebio)
item.description: Simulation-based online learning project covering stochastic, auction, and non-stationary decision settings.
